sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43578" key="eu)grammi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐγραμμ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43578.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good design</tr_>, of figures in tapestry, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
